ground_truth.title: Best Project Manager Jobs in Los Angeles, CA 2025 | Built In Los Angeles

CrowdStrike - Project Manager, Platform Professional Services (Remote) - Reposted 2 Days Ago - Remote or Hybrid - Los Angeles, CA - $115K-160K Annually - Senior level. 8am (Formerly AffiniPay) - Project Manager, Data (Contractor) - Reposted 11 Days Ago - Remote - Los Angeles, CA - Senior level. Mission Cloud - Senior Project Manager, Enterprise - Reposted 3 Days Ago - In-Office or Remote - Los Angeles, CA - Senior level. STV - Operational Readiness, Activation & Transition (ORAT) Project Manager - Reposted 9 Hours Ago - In-Office - Los Angeles, CA - $128K-171K Annually - Mid level. Fox Corporation - Project Manager - Reposted 13 Hours Ago - In-Office - Los Angeles, CA - $102K-140K Annually - Senior level. STV - Project Manager- Education - Reposted 13 Hours Ago - In-Office - Los Angeles, CA - $110K-146K Annually - Senior level. STV - Project Manager - Public Works - Reposted Yesterday - In-Office - Los Angeles, CA - $110K-146K Annually - Senior level. IPG DXTRA - Project Manager - Reposted Yesterday - In-Office - Los Angeles, CA - $75K-90K Annually - Mid level. Lincoln Property Company - Project Manager - Reposted Yesterday - In-Office - Los Angeles, CA - Junior level. Bogaard Group International, Inc. - Security Systems Field Project Manager - 2 Days Ago - Hybrid - Los Angeles, CA - $110K-150K Annually - Senior level. Pixelogic Media - Project Manager - Localization - Reposted 2 Days Ago - In-Office - Los Angeles, CA. Job filtering options available for Job Title, Company or Keyword, Remote/Hybrid preference, Location (Los Angeles, CA), Skills, New Jobs, Job Category, Experience level, and Industry.
